name: Puffco Hot Knife V2
summary: The Puffco Hot Knife V2 is a heated ceramic loading tool designed to make concentrate loading clean, quick, and precise.
description: The Puffco Hot Knife V2 is a heated ceramic loading tool designed to make concentrate loading clean, quick, and precise. With the press of a button, the ceramic tip heats in about 3 seconds, allowing concentrates to drop directly into the chamber without sticking or creating mess. The second-generation Hot Knife improves on the original with a redesigned glazed ceramic tip, a more secure protective cap, faster USB-C charging, and added battery check functionality. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
